calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause Hearing is reset to Jan-30-2024 at 10:30am in Dept 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 21, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Continued To Aug-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff Thomas Lloyd is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to Aug-22-2023. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 13, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
